indicators.name: futuristic furniture
indicators.rationale: Futuristic furniture is not conducive to sleep due to its lack of comfort and ergonomic design.

indicators.name: large digital display
indicators.rationale: Large digital display emits blue light, which can interfere with sleep patterns.

indicators.name: hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring is not comfortable for sleeping and can cause noise.

indicators.name: lack of windows
indicators.rationale: No windows prevent natural light and ventilation, which are important for sleep.

reasoning_summary: The scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). The futuristic furniture, large digital display, hard flooring, and lack of windows all contribute to a negative sleep environment. The score is low due to the absence of any positive indicators.
